MHWCommonRules.WildExplain1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
MHWCommonRules.MiniHauntFeatureDesc1: Mini-Haunt Feature can be triggered randomly on any spin (except Free Spins Feature) that has no win and no Scatter symbol.
MHWCommonRules.MiniHauntFeatureDesc2: During Mini-Haunt Feature, 5 to 8 randomly selected symbols on the reels will be replaced by one randomly chosen symbol: Hand symbol, Skull symbol, Bat symbol or Spider symbol.
MHWCommonRules.FreeSpinsFeatureDesc1: 3, 4 or 5 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins, 12 free spins or 20 free spins respectively.
MHWCommonRules.FreeSpinsFeatureDesc2: During free spins, any Wild symbol that appears on the reels will remain and move to a randomly selected position on the reels for the subsequent free spins until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
MHWCommonRules.FreeSpinsFeatureDesc3: Scatter symbol does not appear during Free Spins Feature.

MHWGameRules.MrHallowWinDesc1: Mr. Hallow-Win! is a 5-reel, 4-row video slot featuring Wild substitutions, Mini-Haunt feature that replaces symbols for guaranteed wins, and free spins with sticky Wilds during the Bonus Free Spins Feature.

MrHallowWinDesc2.value: The game is played with 30 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
MrHallowWinDesc2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations
MrHallowWinDesc2.example: The game is played with 30 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

MHWGameRules.MrHallowWinDesc16: Mini-Haunt Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Mini-Haunt Feature.
MHWGameRules.MrHallowWinDesc17: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
